title: Tick Control Upper East Side | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Upper East Side, Manhattan. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts. Call today for $125-$325 treatment.
intro: The Upper East Side's proximity to Central Park and Carl Schurz Park makes it a beautiful neighborhood, but also increases exposure to ticks that can carry Lyme disease and other illnesses. Our professional tick control services protect Upper East Side residents, their families, and pets from these dangerous pests. We provide comprehensive treatments for yards, gardens, and outdoor spaces throughout this prestigious Manhattan neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in tick management for Upper East Side properties, from elegant townhouses to luxury high-rise terraces and courtyards. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of tick prevention in this densely populated area adjacent to green spaces, using EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children, pets, and the environment.
localContext: Upper East Side residents frequently visit Central Park, Conservatory Garden, and the East River Esplanade, where tick exposure is common. Our services protect private gardens, building courtyards, and outdoor areas near Museum Mile and throughout the neighborhood from East 59th Street to 96th Street, ensuring safe outdoor enjoyment in one of Manhattan's most refined residential districts.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: The Upper East Side's proximity to Central Park and other green spaces creates ideal conditions for ticks. These pests can transmit Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and other serious illnesses to humans and pets. Regular tick control protects your family, especially if you have gardens, terraces, or frequently visit nearby parks.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in the Upper East Side range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, the extent of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments and seasonal packages. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in the Upper East Side from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be present whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend preventive treatments in early spring and continued protection throughout the warm months for optimal results.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my Upper East Side home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for humans and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatments target ticks while minimizing environmental impact, making them ideal for family gardens, rooftop terraces, and outdoor spaces. We provide specific safety instructions and re-entry times for each treatment.
